HERO.TITLE: We Move Your Trade
HERO.TITLE_ACCENT: To Every Corner of the World
HERO.SUBTITLE: Import and export of all food and industrial products with complete safety

ABOUT.SUBTITLE: About Us
ABOUT.TITLE: Your Trusted Partner in
ABOUT.TEXT1: Around The World Trading Co. is your trusted partner led by Mr. Sherif El-Sadat. With over 20 years of experience, we rely on a strong global network built on transparency and fair trade.
ABOUT.TEXT2: We provide high-efficiency import and export solutions that meet our clients' needs and help them succeed in global markets.

STATS.TITLE: Key Statistics of
STATS.DESC: We don't just make promises — we deliver tangible results that reflect our commitment to excellence in international trade.

SERVICES.TITLE: Integrated International
SERVICES.IMPORT_TEXT: A strong international network providing the best products at competitive prices from around the world.
SERVICES.EXPORT_TEXT: Professional export services by selecting the best Egyptian factories and ensuring the highest quality at the best price.
SERVICES.PRODUCTS_TEXT: A wide range of Egyptian products (electronics, food, raw materials) meeting the highest international standards.

WHY.TITLE: Why Choose
WHY.Q1_TEXT: We offer high-quality Egyptian products that precisely meet the expectations of global markets.
WHY.Q2_TEXT: Products at competitive prices giving our clients a real advantage in local and international markets.
WHY.Q3_TEXT: Fast and accurate shipment delivery according to the agreed schedule with no delays.
WHY.Q4_TEXT: Relying on experts with vast experience in international trade and logistics services.
WHY.Q5_TEXT: Preparing shipping documents and providing diverse shipping methods to suit every client's needs.
